'''Nullip''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]] of a [[Detainer CC-2200/Legends|Detainer CC-2200 interdictor cruiser]] that served in the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|Battle of Kashyyyk]] over [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when a [[Recusant-class light destroyer/Legends|''Recusant''-class light destroyer]] was rammed into his ship.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
